text: 1) BIOLOGY Multiple Choice Which of the following drugs is mismatched to its action on neurotransmission? W) Benzodiazepines: Increases inhibitory neurotransmission X) Cocaine: inhibits release of dopamine and norepinephrine Y) LSD: Binds to serotonin receptors Z) Nicotine: decreases brain dopamine levels
